title: Lucia
writer: Julio García Espinosa, Nelson Rodríguez, Humberto Solás
actors: Raquel Revuelta, Eslinda Núñez, Adela Legrá
plot: Traces episodes in the lives of three Cuban women, each named Lucía, from three different historical periods: the Cuban war of independence (with Spain), the 1930s, and the 1960s.
